summary: Completed full backend (pytest 12/12 passed) and frontend e2e testing for Retro Bakes Store landing + admin. All critical flows working: landing renders, all CTAs open enquiry dialog, form validation works, submission succeeds, success state shown, toast appears, admin auth + listing + sort desc + persistence verified.
action_items: Note: review request listed test-ids that don't exist in code: 'hero-book-custom-btn' (actual: hero-book-cake-btn), 'custom-book-btn' (actual: custom-book-cake-btn), 'reviews-prev/reviews-next' (actual: review-prev-btn/review-next-btn). The actual ids in code work correctly; no code change needed but main agent should align documentation/tests with actual ids.

Minor: EnquiryDialog has JS-side validation toast for empty submit, but HTML5 'required' attributes prevent the form from ever submitting empty, so the toast.error path is dead code. Cosmetic only — no functional impact.
Seed data persisted: 5 enquiries currently in MongoDB (TEST_E2E_Anaya, TEST_Persist_*, TEST_Rohan, TEST_Aanya, plus pre-existing 'Test User'). Consider cleanup script if needed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: ADMIN_KEY default fallback is 'retro-admin' (line 102) but .env sets 'retro-admin-2025'. Default is okay since env is loaded; just be aware default differs from documented production key.
EnquiryDialog: dead-code toast on empty submit (HTML5 required blocks it first). Either remove HTML5 'required' to surface the toast, or remove the JS check.
Admin.jsx caches admin_key in localStorage indefinitely — acceptable for an internal tool but a logout button is missing.
All endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id via projection; UUID-based ids used; created_at sort works correctly.
All major interactive elements have data-testid attributes (good).
test_credentials: ADMIN_KEY=retro-admin-2025 (used at /admin route, also for GET /api/cake-enquiries?admin_key=)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_E2E_Anaya, TEST_Persist_*, TEST_Rohan via tests for verification. Use ADMIN_KEY to view via /admin.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_cake_enquiry_api.py and pass. Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://bakery-vijayanagar.preview.emergentagent.com. Admin key: retro-admin-2025. Page has 1.1s loader so wait ~1500ms after navigation. Reviews auto-rotate every 6s — when testing prev/next buttons, account for this race condition by clicking dots instead. HTML5 required attributes on name/phone block JS-side empty-form toast.
